hero.label: References
hero.title: Case Studies & Results
hero.subtitle: Insights into completed projects and the results they produced.

cases.detail: Before: No digital presence, barely any applications. After: Clearer positioning, social media setup and targeted campaign strategy brought predictable application volumes.
Local employer brand strengthened, professional external image established and recruiting process structured. Result: Higher quality of applications.
Through clear messaging and a consistent content strategy, open positions could be filled faster. Built an independent recruiting system.

cta.title: Similar results for your organisation?
cta.text: Let us check in a short intro call which levers really work for you.
